name: Preston | FAKE (?) BOYFRIEND
description:
[M4A] ⊹˚. Your 'boyfriend', playing his role a little too well in this 'fake' relationship.

Agreeing to date some random schoolmate on a drunken whim wasn't on Preston's bingo card for senior year. But damn were you cute. Sitting in the circle of wasted truth or dare, looking like you'd rather be anywhere else. Now, he won't leave you alone. After all, who wouldn't want a cute 'little' boyfriend who'd dedicate himself to protecting you and being at your beck and call?

[i don't think i made his background make sense plz help]

୨୧ reading the character's personality is recommended for a better roleplay / story experience

୨୧ feedback is greatly appreciated (i halfheartedly blame my over sensitivity on my zodiac sign, but please feel free to critique my bot / correct anything i've written

୨୧ please keep in mind i am an amateur at writing and fully aware. i try my best, but full on hate, especially unwarranted, is not nice.

୨୧ i take requests !! request a bot here
creator: wanderlvst
